violations.text: (Beverages ) were observed stored on the floor in the (walk in cooler and back storage area). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (chlorine ) sanitizing solution for the (3 bay sink). New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025
Inspector observed a mop bucket filled with stagnant gray water. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment, clutter or items were observed in the (storage) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025
